title: Vacancy for a Publications Manager
body: "Your responsibilities will include, but are not limited to:    Overseeing the publications team activities, to ensure delivery of agreed targets and standards for accident investigation reports.   Ensuring MAIB’s online presence and public profile is kept up-to-date, and that content is published appropriately for each medium and improving any accessibility requirements.   Coordinate the delivery of publication work outside of the routine scope, including any promotional material or in-house documentation, prioritising requests.   Overseeing the work within the publications team and working along with senior leaders within the branch, across the three Accident Investigation Branches and wider DfT to provide and maintain efficient workflows.    For further information about this position and how to apply see Civil Service Jobs, Publications Manager, Ref: 440464 "
